overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in wizard robes exploring a historic stone castle courtyard at night. The character walks around a central fountain, explores an outer terrace with scenic views, and ascends to an upper battlement walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking around the central stone fountain, examining the courtyard

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with circular basin
tall stone castle wall with illuminated windows
tall stone castle wall with illuminated windows
ornate black lamppost with warm orange glow
trimmed green hedge bordering the path

segments.scene_description: The character explores a stone courtyard at night, circling a large central fountain. Warm lamplight illuminates the historic castle walls surrounding the open area.

events.description: exits the central courtyard onto the outer terrace path

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved stone path away from the courtyard toward the scenic overlook

entered.detail: dark silhouette of mountains against the night sky
stone garden bench alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fountain behind, the character walks along an open terrace path. The view opens to reveal a distant landscape under the cloudy night sky, with stone benches lining the walkway.

events.description: turns back toward the castle buildings from the overlook
approaches the stone staircase leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden area with stone benches, returning toward the main castle building

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending to upper level
multiple stone benches arranged along the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns back from the overlook and walks through a garden courtyard lined with benches and hedges. A stone staircase leading to an upper level comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper battlement

events.description: encounters another character at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper walkway

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs as the player reaches the top

entered.detail: large decorative stone urns flanking the stair top

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase flanked by decorative urns. At the top, they encounter another person descending as they reach the upper battlement level.

events.description: emerges onto the upper battlement walkway
passes the NPC and continues along the wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper castle wall with views of the distant landscape

notable_agents.action: walking along the battlement in the opposite direction, passing the player

entered.detail: crenellated stone wall with gaps overlooking the drop
mountain range visible under the cloudy night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper battlement, the character passes the NPC and continues along the crenellated wall. The path offers expansive views of the distant mountains under the dark blue night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate warmth of a castle courtyard to the expansive heights of an open battlement under a night sky. It begins by circling a large central fountain illuminated by warm lamplight against historic stone walls before moving away toward an open terrace path. As the character leaves the fountain, the view expands to reveal a distant landscape under a cloudy sky, then shifts back through a garden courtyard lined with hedges and benches. The camera then follows the ascent up a steep stone staircase flanked by decorative urns, where the character passes another person upon reaching the upper level. Finally, the scene opens wide as the character walks along the crenellated wall of the battlement, offering a panoramic view of distant mountains beneath a dark blue night sky.
